item.title: Character.AI Gave Up on AGI. Now It’s Selling Stories
item.description: Startup Character.AI once promised superintelligence. Its new CEO says it's now an entertainment company with 20 million users.
item.media:keywords: Model Behavior, artificial intelligence, chatbots, Safety, kids
item.dc:creator: Kylie Robison
item.dc:subject: Model Behavior

item.title: Apple’s AI Ambitions Leave Big Questions Over Its Climate Goals
item.description: Halfway to its 2030 net-zero goal, Apple faces slow and hold-out suppliers, a tariffs scramble, and an AI race that could profoundly impact eco-friendly ambitions.
item.media:keywords: apple, iPhone, artificial intelligence, phones, Google
item.dc:creator: Sophie Charara
item.dc:subject: Green Apple

item.title: OpenAI Scrambles to Update GPT-5 After Users Revolt
item.description: GPT-5 was touted as a major upgrade to ChatGPT. Not all users think that’s the case, posting threads like “Kill 4o isn’t innovation, it’s erasure” on Reddit.
item.media:keywords: OpenAI, Sam Altman, ChatGPT, chatbots, algorithms, mental health
item.dc:creator: Will Knight
item.dc:subject: Model Backlash

item.title: WIRED Roundup: What’s Behind OpenAI’s Government Partnership?
item.description: On this episode of Uncanny Valley, we discuss the week’s news, from bitcoin miners trying to beat Trump’s tariffs to OpenAI's new deal with the US government.
item.media:keywords: Uncanny Valley Podcast, politics, News, OpenAI, artificial intelligence, bitcoin
item.dc:creator: Zoë Schiffer, Jake Lahut
item.dc:subject: Uncanny Valley

item.title: An AI Model for the Brain Is Coming to the ICU
item.description: The Cleveland Clinic and startup Piramidal are developing an AI model trained on brain wave data to monitor intensive care patients.
item.media:keywords: science, Neuroscience, eeg, artificial intelligence, brains
item.dc:creator: Emily Mullin
item.dc:subject: Brain Training

item.title: What Does Palantir Actually Do?
item.description: Palantir is often called a data broker, a data miner, or a giant database of personal information. In reality, it’s none of these—but even former employees struggle to explain it.
item.media:keywords: Palantir, Defense, Peter Thiel, software, artificial intelligence
item.dc:creator: Caroline Haskins
item.dc:subject: Save the Shire

item.title: Truth Social’s New AI Chatbot Is Donald Trump’s Media Diet Incarnate
item.description: Truth Search AI appears to rely heavily on conservative outlet Fox News to answer even the most basic questions.
item.media:keywords: artificial intelligence, algorithms, Social Media, chatbots, Donald Trump, Truth Social, politics
item.dc:creator: Guthrie Scrimgeour
item.dc:subject: Fox and Friends

item.title: The Vibes-Based Pricing of ‘Pro’ AI Software
item.description: In this episode of Uncanny Valley, we're talking about why some chatbot subscriptions are so expensive and how these premium prices were determined on vibes more than anything substantial.
item.media:keywords: Uncanny Valley Podcast, podcasts, artificial intelligence, chatbots, OpenAI, ChatGPT, Anthropic
item.dc:creator: Lauren Goode, Michael Calore, Reece Rogers
item.dc:subject: Uncanny Valley

item.title: Join Our Next Livestream: What GPT-5 Means for ChatGPT Users
item.description: On August 14, bring your questions about OpenAI's latest model, GPT-5, and what it means for the future of chatbots.
item.media:keywords: webinar, chatbots, artificial intelligence, OpenAI, ChatGPT
item.dc:creator: Reece Rogers
item.dc:subject: Livestream Q&A

item.title: OpenAI Finally Launched GPT-5. Here's Everything You Need to Know
item.description: OpenAI released GPT-5 on Thursday to both free users of ChatGPT and paying subscribers.
item.media:keywords: OpenAI, Sam Altman, ChatGPT, artificial intelligence
item.dc:creator: Kylie Robison
item.dc:subject: GPT-5
